overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sunlit urban sidewalk past commercial buildings and construction barriers, crossing a multi-lane street, and approaching a Delamain facility in a futuristic neon-lit city.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with laundromat and construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Wash & Run laundromat, approaching the construction barrier wall

notable_agents.action: muscular pedestrian in red shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: corner building with blue neon signage reading 'Wash & Run' and outdoor seating
tall red-brown construction barrier wall running parallel to the sidewalk
tall blue-painted street lamp post with curved arm

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny urban sidewalk beside the Wash & Run laundromat. The camera follows the character walking forward as pedestrians approach from the opposite direction. A long construction barrier wall begins on the left, while moderate traffic flows on the street to the right.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the construction wall, passing large billboards and approaching the overpass

notable_agents.action: heavyset pedestrian in blue vest and brown pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: large red billboard with 'ZEN' text and figure imagery mounted on construction wall
yellow elevated highway overpass spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the enclosed construction corridor with high walls on the left featuring large advertisements. The Wash & Run recedes behind as the character approaches a yellow overpass bridge in the distance. Pedestrians continue to pass by in the opposite direction.

events.description: character turns right and steps off the curb to cross the multi-lane street
crossing between lanes of futuristic traffic including a pink sports car and black sedan

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and crossing the street toward the Delamain building while navigating through traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic pink sports car driving past on the road

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with 'DELAMAIN' signage and art deco facade
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The construction wall ends as the character approaches a wide intersection. Turning right, the character crosses the multi-lane street through moderate traffic, with the Delamain building becoming visible on the opposite corner. The environment opens up with more street trees and wider road space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with Delamain facility entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Delamain entrance and parked vehicles, continuing through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: small child in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic turquoise sedan parked at the curb with police officer standing nearby
illuminated 'DELAMAIN' sign above the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the sidewalk passing the Delamain facility with its distinctive signage. A turquoise police car is parked at the curb, and the character continues past benches and storefronts into a more open commercial area with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit urban sidewalk that transitions from a confined construction corridor into an open commercial district. It begins beside the Wash & Run laundromat, following the character forward as pedestrians pass by and a long construction barrier wall rises on the left. As the character moves deeper into this enclosed corridor beneath large advertisements, the laundromat recedes and a yellow overpass bridge appears in the distance. The scene then opens up as the construction wall ends, leading the camera to turn right and cross a wide, multi-lane street through moderate traffic toward the Delamain building. Finally, the camera follows the character past the Delamain facility and a parked turquoise police car, moving into a spacious area characterized by palm trees and towering futuristic skyscrapers.
